column1:
Library name
(REQUIRED)


17 character MAX

Must start with a letter
 
Only alphanumeric, no special characters (no +, -, $, etc.)
column2:
Sublibrary name
(REQUIRED)



Name must start with a letter

Names must be < 17 characters, 

Alphanumeric only
 
NO special characters (no +, -, $, etc.)
column3:
Ultima Index Sequence
(REQUIRED)

Barcode ID is okay, but please provide us with a list of corresponding nucleotide sequences
column4:
Project Identifier

Letters/Numbers only, dashes & underscores OKAY

Recommend to start with PI last name (e.g. Davis-embryo_trace)

This should have been confirmed with lattice team (let us know if not!)
column5:
Experiement Identifier

Letters/Numbers only, dashes & underscores OKAY

Needed for Scale/Sci libraries (NOT required for 10X libraries)
column6:
Group Identifier 

The identifier of a group  libraries generated from the same sample, like GEX + CRISPR for perturb-seq or GEX  ATAC for multiome

If not created from the same sample, use the same "library Name" in this field
column7:
Assay Type 

Select one of: GEX, CRI, ATAC, hash_oligo, GEX_hash_oligo)
column8:
Library Kit 

For example 10x 3' v4, 10x FLEX v1, 10X FLEX v2, …)

Please be as specific as possible and include the version of the kit used, if applicable
column9:
Data Delivery Method
(REQUIRED)

Please choose UG-Fastq, UG-CRAM, or UG-uCRAM only
column12:
Data Amount per Library (M reads)
(REQUIRED)

Unit is M reads.
column14:
Wafer #
(REQUIRED)
Indicate which wafer (#1, #2, etc.) the sample should be sequenced on. If only 1 wafer, not required. 

Reminder: Each wafer has a mximum amount of 10B reads
